summary: Add read-only ad-hoc SQL command (sql) against the local synced DB with defense-in-depth write-token rejection and cell truncation.
reason: A19 sql is part of the locked 16-command surface. The press scaffolder does not emit it because it's not derivable from the API spec. Local novel command that must survive regeneration.
validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet ./..., staged binary rebuild, sql help/root help, sql table smoke, sql --explain smoke, and DROP rejection pass with a workspace smoke DB; default DB smoke reports sync hint because the local synced DB is absent.
